MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SCOTT AVAL, Esq. of Avrek Law Firm (Tel: 949-313-3511) for movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Sloan Kristy;
No other appearances made in this matter.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OF PLAINTIFF SLOAN KRISTY.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/SRB)
